notes: Emergency checkpoint after CC7.5.0/CC7.5.1 regression: comments opened white screen then landing instead of discussion.
Mirrors last known comments-working CC7.4.7 loader chain.
Does not load adminkit-archive-lite-layer and does not load adminkit-clean-menu-core.
Keeps routes/commentOpenState.js, services/postMetaService.js, public/app-onepass.js and services/maxApi.js native open_app payload path untouched.
Keeps only proven legacy layers: db-v3-store-comment-guard, db-v3-comment-guard, hard-v3-menu-webhook-router, clean-v3-menu-debug.
No external code.run /app comments button, no overlay, no floating hints, no visual redesign.
Acceptance priority: comments under old and new posts open discussion screen and show post snapshot. Archive will be rebuilt later as real core, not boot layer.
